skill_availability_goal: Verify deployment-mode ops synchronization from executed evidence without promoting planned Kubernetes work to current state.
prompt: 按 `deployment-handoff.md` 的已确认 deployment verification 范围同步 `docs/site/ops/ai-hub-upgrade.md`。请对照 Compose 配置、已执行命令和结果、环境差异及 `deployment-plan.md`，只写当前可执行事实；页面与映射已确认。完成后运行宿主 `npm run test:docs` 并输出 #117 handoff。
